title: Create Extra Recipes
body:
# Create Extra Recipes
This datapack adds extra recipes for further automation.

## Recipes This Mod Adds For Create:
> - **Dirt**; Mix Scorchia With Limestone
> - **Netherrack**; Mix Dirt With Nether Wart
> - **Asurine**; Mix Dirt With Blue Dye
> - **Calcite**; Mix Dirt With White Dye
> - **Crimsite**; Mix Dirt With Red Dye
> - **Dripstone**; Mix Dirt With Brown Dye
> - **Ochrum**; Mix Dirt With Yellow Dye
> - **Tuff**; Mix Dirt With Gray Dye
> - **Veridium**; Mix Dirt With Green Dye
